# `mise system`

- **Usage**: `mise system <SUBCOMMAND>`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/system/mod.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/system/mod.rs)

[experimental] Manage system packages from `[system.packages]`

System packages are machine-global packages installed by the OS package
manager (apt) or mise's Homebrew-bottle installer (brew). Unlike
`[tools]`, they are not version-pinned per-project and are only ever
installed when explicitly requested with `mise system install`.

## Subcommands

- [`mise system install [FLAGS]`](/cli/system/install.md)
- [`mise system status [-J --json] [--missing]`](/cli/system/status.md)
